codex exec --json --sandbox read-only --approval-mode never "You are a code reviewer. Review the following diff and emit your findings as a JSON array conforming exactly to the canonical-finding-schema embedded below. Do not include explanatory text outside the JSON.\n\n[canonical-finding-schema omitted for brevity — embedded in production prompt]\n\nDiff:\ndiff --git a/src/auth/handleLogin.ts b/src/auth/handleLogin.ts\n..."
